texto: I saw a few Sligo people at Mass in Gardiner Street this morning and the omens seem to be good for them, the priest was wearing the same colours as the Sligo jersey! 40 yards out on the Hogan Stand side of the field Ciarán Whelan goes on a rampage, it's a goal. So much for religion.
explicacao: Citação de Micheál Ó Muircheartaigh sobre temas ligados a fe. “I saw a few Sligo people at Mass in Gardiner Street this morning and the omens seem to be good fo…” articula fe, gaa, religion em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como bom-dia e religion.

frase_original: I saw a few Sligo people at Mass in Gardiner Street this morning and the omens seem to be good for them, the priest was wearing the same colours as the Sligo jersey! 40 yards out on the Hogan Stand side of the field Ciarán Whelan goes on a rampage, it's a goal. So much for religion.
